## prompt-4-figure-selection

*Generated by Process A from `cancer-automated/.../VVUQ-05/update-bill/figures-bill/prompt-figures-bill.md` and the figures-bill catalog, adapted for the single-prompt v4.0 build.*

Using the visual-representation catalog in
`cancer-automated/tree/main/papers/VVUQ-05/update-bill/figures-bill` (the master
`README.md` and the five catalogs `01RootREADME.md`, `02VVUQ01.md`, `03VVUQ02.md`,
`04VVUQ03.md`, `05VVUQ04.md`) and the gray-scale Mermaid set from Stage 3, decide
the correct figure type for each figure slot in H. R. 9510 v4.0. For every slot,
identify the visual representation it descends from in the catalog (lineage boxes,
gate funnel, decision surface, statutory layering, accelerated timeline,
position-in-lineage, repository structure, cross-file correlation map), then choose
the most appropriate gray-scale Mermaid diagram type to render it (flowchart,
sequence, component, swimlane, BPMN, C4, or clustered graph), so every figure type
is correct for its content and no diagram type is overused.

Produce a figure plan as a table: figure number, title, bill location (which
SECTION or which deliverable appendix), the catalog source it visualizes, the
Mermaid diagram type chosen, and the matching table slots where a table (not a
diagram) is the correct representation. Preference, as in the source prompt, is
for full-width figures detailed in surrounding text, synthesized side-by-side
figures, prompt-evolution and bill-evolution figures, and comprehensive
repository structures over file-name lists in prose. Every figure is a gray-scale
Mermaid diagram in Markdown and a matching gray-scale TikZ figure in the compiled
LaTeX (no images, Rule 5).

Output `auto-bill-01/04-figure-selection/output-4-figure-selection.md` plus a
directory `README.md` naming the upstream files used. Commit each file separately
and push in real time within a single pull request. Use only Claude Code Opus 4.8
(1M context) Max. Do not stall, ask questions, or go into plan mode.
